growth_records.medium: Natural seawater medium (Santa Barbara Channel, aged, 0.2um filtered, autoclaved) + trace elements

up.units: mol C / mol N (DIC fixation yield)

growth_records.cite: Bayer, Barbara et al. Carbon content, carbon fixation yield and dissolved organic carbon release from diverse marine nitrifiers. Limnology and Oceanography (2023). DOI:10.1002/lno.12252. [PMC10092583]
growth_records.method: not reported (growth followed by flow cytometry cell counts; no mu given in main text)
growth_records.snippet: Ca. Nitrosopelagicus U25 ... Natural seawater ... DIC fixation yield 0.111 ± 0.008 ... DIC fixation efficiency 396 ± 29/735 ± 53 ... Biomass yield 0.187 ± 0.019 (gBio gN-1). Ca. Nitrosopelagicus U25 was grown at 22C with initial substrate c
growth_records.notes: Prokaryote (ammonia-oxidizing archaeon, Thaumarchaeota). All values from Table 2 (environmentally relevant conditions). DIC fixation yield & biomass yield MEASURED via 14C. No specific growth rate (mu) or absolute biomass-specific uptake rate in mmol/gDW/h given in main text (cell-normalized DIC fixation rates are in Table S2, not in this XML). Uses 3-HP/4-HB DIC fixation cycle. Cellular C 10.8 fgC/cell (stationary, Table 1). Biomass formula CH1.7O0.4N0.25.
